chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-443 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No. 3311/2023 (1R10 CPC) 2. For hearing of main case 09.12.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General ************** None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. It is pertinent to note that this matter was earlier listed on 30.08.2023, on which date as well no one appeared on behalf of the petitioner. Such repeated non-appearance demonstrates a clear lack of interest and diligence in the prosecution of the petition. It is the obligation of every litigant to remain vigilant and to pursue his case with due care; failure to do so amounts to abandonment of the proceedings. Accordingly, keeping in view the continued absence and the apparent disinterest of the petitioner and his learned counsel, the present constitutional petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
